positive: A celestial geometric mandala design featuring bioluminescent cosmic flora and abstract nebula patterns. The composition must be strictly centered, highly symmetrical, and suitable for a clean apparel print. Main elements include stylized, glowing crystalline leaves, looping celestial vines, and ethereal, swirling nebulae gradients in deep indigo, electric teal, luminous cyan, and vibrant violet. The style should be a mix of intricate sacred geometry, Art Nouveau etching, and deep space macro photography. Emphasis on strong contrast, crisp silhouettes, and clean, sharp edges, making the design pop against a solid background. Hyper-detailed, vector-like quality, graphic novel aesthetic, high contrast black outlines on a dark field.
